description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular tabletop with a subtle beveled edge and a single front-facing drawer adorned with ornate floral carvings and two decorative handles. The legs are elegantly turned, tapering toward the bottom, and are accented with carved details near the top. The front corners of the nightstand display additional carved embellishments, enhancing its classic and refined appearance. The overall finish is a muted gray, giving it a sophisticated and neutral look suitable for various settings. The drawer appears functional, providing storage space, while the flat top offers a stable surface for placing items. The construction suggests a solid wood build, with visible craftsmanship in the decorative elements.
description: A classic gray nightstand with ornate carvings, a single drawer with decorative handles, and elegantly turned legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate drawer with floral carvings and two decorative handles, as well as detailed leg accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain side panel and the carved embellishments on the upper corners of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain back panel with no visible drawer or handles, and the symmetrical leg design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same plain side panel and decorative leg accents as the other side.
attribute_leg_design: turned wooden legs with carved accents
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
